text: Provider liability is unlimited for all direct, indirect, and consequential damages.
label: CRITICAL

text: Company may process personal data globally without a data processing agreement or breach notice obligations.
label: CRITICAL

text: Vendor indemnifies customer for all claims, penalties, and losses without exclusions or caps.
label: CRITICAL

text: Customer may terminate immediately for convenience while vendor remains fully liable for open obligations.
label: CRITICAL

text: Supplier must maintain cyber, privacy, and security compliance but no breach response timeline is stated.
label: CRITICAL

text: This agreement imposes uncapped liability for any confidentiality or intellectual property breach.
label: CRITICAL

text: Supplier shall indemnify customer on a sole and exclusive basis for all third-party claims.
label: HIGH

text: Either party may terminate for convenience on ten days notice with no transition assistance.
label: HIGH

text: Customer may assign this agreement freely while vendor requires prior written consent.
label: HIGH

text: Service credits are the exclusive remedy for repeated service level failures.

text: The warranty disclaimer removes all implied warranties and narrows remedies to provider discretion.

text: Governing law is referenced but the state and venue are not clearly identified.

text: Payment is due on receipt and invoicing disputes must be raised within five business days.

text: Force majeure covers broad business interruptions without mitigation duties.

text: Notice requirements are inconsistent across email and courier methods.

text: Confidential information survives termination but return and deletion timing is not specified.

text: Assignment requires prior written consent from the other party.
label: LOW

text: The agreement includes a standard severability clause and non-waiver provision.

label: LOW

text: Liability is capped at fees paid in the twelve months before the claim and excludes consequential damages.

label: COMPLIANT

text: Indemnification is mutual and limited to third-party claims arising from each party's negligence.

text: Either party may terminate for convenience on sixty days notice with payment for services performed.
